votes.rationale: Ratify motion-0054 to add the first working provider-backed narrative generation lane to Motion Factory v0 using OpenAI while preserving deterministic structural scaffolding and DRAFT-only output.

The motion is tightly bounded. Structural files remain deterministic, generated narrative is limited to draft-time content, and the motion explicitly forbids evidence tables, vote entries, ratification claims, and writes outside the target motion directory.

Unanimous consent is satisfied. motion-0054 correctly activates the first live provider-backed proposer lane for Motion Factory without granting governance authority, revision behavior, or orchestration behavior.
